query: Mt. Ashwabay Summit cross country ski race Mt. Ashwabay

videos.title: XC Sking Mt Ashwabay
videos.description: Cross Country Skiing at Mount Ashwabay in Bayfield, Wisconsin.

videos.title: Mt. Ashwabay XC 1-3-11
videos.description: This is a time lapse of some of Mt. Ashwabay's XC trails on 1-3-11.  The route is Sugarbush Classic, Seagull Classic, Anchor, Roller Coaster.  Conditions are rated Fair-Poor by normal standards, although considering the weather we've had, the snow was in good shape.  The base is approx 4", and there are rocks and sticks poking through the bottom of the tracks.  The worst part is definitely Sugarbush near the trail head.  Once you get up the hill and into the valleys, the conditions improve greatly.  Definitely bring the rock skis, but get out and enjoy the snow we have!  The Alpine hill is in good condition for those looking for space to skate/train.

videos.title: Mt. Ashwabay Nordic: Seagull Hill
videos.description: Take a ride down the Seagull Hill.

videos.title: Summit Race 2013
videos.description:
Mt. Ashwabay Summit Ski Race February 2nd, 2013.

We have an 8 km classic race, 19 km pursuit race, a 11 km skate race, a 3.5 km youth race and a .5 km kids race (this is a non-timed event for those 8 and under).

For more information, and registration information, please visit http://www.ashwabaysummitskirace.com/

If you like this film you can support more like it at sunridgemovingpictures.com just put a donation in your shopping cart
